author.description: Assistant to the President and the 36th White House Press Secretary

tweets.text:
President Trump is returning home from a historic trip to Asia that resulted in more peace deals, trade deals, and investments pouring into our country. 

The trip concluded with a highly productive and positive meeting with President Xi of China. President Trump fiercely advocated for America's farmers, America's businesses, American consumers, and every American impacted by the fentanyl crisis. And he delivered huge results.

Gone are the days of having a President who apologizes for America. President Trump proudly stands up for America, and he always will. 

Peace through Strength is back.
tweets.text_resolved:
